title: Every Mob Drops
description: A datapack/mod that makes every mob drop something
body:
### **Mod Drops**

This mod/datapack makes every mob drop something.

Check gallery for images.

![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd83101f24f263d987c6643d5bc8263b9c73d9e9_0.webp)

The mob with a modified drop are these:

Allay

Armadillo

bat

bee

camel

endermite

fox

goat

happy ghast

ocelot

panda

silverfish

sniffer

tadpole

vex

villager

wandering trader
